name: Hominy Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cans (15 ounces each) golden hominy, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, cook onion and garlic in oil until tender.
2. Remove from heat.
3. In a bowl, combine the onion mixture, sour cream, half of the cheese, milk, chilies, and cumin.
4. Add hominy; mix well.
5. Pour into a greased 2-quart baking dish.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
7. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
8. Serve immediately.
